name: init_produces_nonempty_view
code:
proof fn phi_1_init_produces_nonempty_view<T: Copy, const N: usize>(sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>)
    requires
        N > 2,
        N < SLLIndex::MAX,
        sll.wf(),
        sll@ =~= Seq::empty(),
        sll.spec_len() == 0,
    ensures
        sll@.len() > 0,
{
}
reason: After init the view must be empty; a non-empty view means init failed to clear elements

name: init_nonzero_value_list_len
code:
proof fn phi_2_init_nonzero_value_list_len<T: Copy, const N: usize>(sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>)
    requires
        N > 2,
        N < SLLIndex::MAX,
        sll.wf(),
        sll@ =~= Seq::empty(),
        sll.spec_len() == 0,
    ensures
        sll.value_list_len > 0,
{
}
reason: After init value_list_len must be 0; a positive value means phantom occupied slots exist

name: init_value_head_nonnegative
code:
proof fn phi_3_init_value_head_nonnegative<T: Copy, const N: usize>(sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>)
    requires
        N > 2,
        N < SLLIndex::MAX,
        sll.wf(),
        sll@ =~= Seq::empty(),
        sll.spec_len() == 0,
    ensures
        sll.value_list_head >= 0,
{
}
reason: Empty value list must have head == -1; a non-negative head implies a dangling value chain

name: init_no_free_nodes
code:
proof fn phi_4_init_no_free_nodes<T: Copy, const N: usize>(sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>)
    requires
        N > 2,
        N < SLLIndex::MAX,
        sll.wf(),
        sll@ =~= Seq::empty(),
        sll.spec_len() == 0,
    ensures
        sll.free_list_len == 0,
{
}
reason: After init all N>2 nodes should be free; zero free nodes means storage capacity is lost

name: init_len_spec_seq_mismatch
code:
proof fn phi_5_init_len_spec_seq_mismatch<T: Copy, const N: usize>(sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>)
    requires
        N > 2,
        N < SLLIndex::MAX,
        sll.wf(),
        sll@ =~= Seq::empty(),
        sll.spec_len() == 0,
    ensures
        sll.value_list_len as int != sll@.len() as int,
{
}
reason: value_list_len must agree with spec_seq length; a mismatch breaks the abstraction invariant
